This binary file was not committed to Git because it is too large for a lightweight GitHub repository.
The local full copy has been moved to:

  .local-large-files\references\vendor\车车\【WHEELTEC】TB6612电机驱动附送资料\1.用户手册与使用教程\TB6612带稳压电机驱动模块（D153C）使用教程视频.mp4

Restore command from the repository root:

  Move-Item -LiteralPath ".local-large-files\references\vendor\车车\【WHEELTEC】TB6612电机驱动附送资料\1.用户手册与使用教程\TB6612带稳压电机驱动模块（D153C）使用教程视频.mp4" -Destination "references\vendor\车车\【WHEELTEC】TB6612电机驱动附送资料\1.用户手册与使用教程\TB6612带稳压电机驱动模块（D153C）使用教程视频.mp4"
